nasb.text: “Like an apple tree among the trees of the forest, So is my beloved among the young men. In his shade I took great delight and sat down, And his fruit was sweet to my taste.

esv.text: As an apple tree among the trees of the forest, so is my beloved among the young men. With great delight I sat in his shadow, and his fruit was sweet to my taste.

cnv.text: 我的良人在男子中， 好像樹林裡的一棵蘋果樹； 我歡歡喜喜地坐在它的蔭下， 它的果子香甜合我口味。

ccb.text: 我的良人在众男子中， 好像林中的一棵苹果树。 我欢欢喜喜地坐在他的树荫下， 轻尝他香甜无比的果子。
